args.query:
SELECT 
  o.OwnerId,
  AVG(CAST((julianday(CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE)) - julianday(CAST(o.CreatedDate AS TIMESTAMP))) AS INTEGER)) as avg_turnaround_days
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON TRIM(o.ContractID__c, '#') = TRIM(c.Id, '#')
WHERE CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) >= '2023-04-01' 
  AND CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) < '2023-05-01'
  AND o.ContractID__c IS NOT NULL
  AND o.ContractID__c != 'None'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
  AND o.CreatedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_turnaround_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT 
  o.OwnerId,
  AVG(CAST((julianday(CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE)) - julianday(CAST(o.CreatedDate AS TIMESTAMP))) AS INTEGER)) as avg_turnaround_days
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON TRIM(o.ContractID__c, '#') = TRIM(c.Id, '#')
WHERE CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) >= '2023-04-01' 
  AND CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) < '2023-05-01'
  AND o.ContractID__c IS NOT NULL
  AND o.ContractID__c != 'None'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
  AND o.CreatedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_turnaround_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

"DuckDB query execution error (CatalogException): Catalog Error: Scalar Function with name to_date does not exist!
Did you mean "to_days"?

LINE 7: WHERE TO_DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) >= DATE '2023-04-01'
              ^"

args.query:
SELECT 
  o.OwnerId,
  AVG(CAST(TO_DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) - TO_DATE(o.CreatedDate) AS INTEGER)) as avg_turnaround_days
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', ''), '#') = TRIM(REPLACE(c.Id, '#', ''), '#')
WHERE TO_DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) >= DATE '2023-04-01'
  AND TO_DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) < DATE '2023-05-01'
  AND o.ContractID__c IS NOT NULL
  AND o.ContractID__c != 'None'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
  AND o.CreatedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_turnaround_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT 
  o.OwnerId,
  AVG(CAST(TO_DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) - TO_DATE(o.CreatedDate) AS INTEGER)) as avg_turnaround_days
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', ''), '#') = TRIM(REPLACE(c.Id, '#', ''), '#')
WHERE TO_DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) >= DATE '2023-04-01'
  AND TO_DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) < DATE '2023-05-01'
  AND o.ContractID__c IS NOT NULL
  AND o.ContractID__c != 'None'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
  AND o.CreatedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_turnaround_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT 
  o.OwnerId,
  AVG(CAST((DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) - DATE(o.CreatedDate)) AS INTEGER)) as avg_turnaround_days
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(c.Id, '#', ''))
WHERE DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) >= '2023-04-01'
  AND DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) < '2023-05-01'
  AND o.ContractID__c IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(o.ContractID__c) != ''
  AND o.ContractID__c != 'None'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
  AND o.CreatedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
ORDER BY avg_turnaround_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT 
  o.OwnerId,
  AVG(CAST((DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) - DATE(o.CreatedDate)) AS INTEGER)) as avg_turnaround_days
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(c.Id, '#', ''))
WHERE DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) >= '2023-04-01'
  AND DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) < '2023-05-01'
  AND o.ContractID__c IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(o.ContractID__c) != ''
  AND o.ContractID__c != 'None'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
  AND o.CreatedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
ORDER BY avg_turnaround_days ASC
LIMIT 1;
